edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: the longest day of rain of the year

edus.speaker: ljaybrad123
edus.text: it fell on the 20th this year which was odd

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: indeed, at least it was mostly sunny

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: waiting on tomas now and william about 8.15, right?

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: and more 8s came up than 6s when i only had 8s

edus.speaker: ljaybrad123
edus.text: we had soooo many 7s last game

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: how long shall we give him?

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: or shall we camp on the server till 8.15!

edus.speaker: ljaybrad123
edus.text: unless the second game happens early it doesnt bother me...

edus.speaker: ljaybrad123
edus.text: i might return to minecraft though...

edus.speaker: ljaybrad123
edus.text: I kinda just caught the bug

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: but know its addictive nature from my friends

edus.speaker: ljaybrad123
edus.text: then the final game is the decider.;;;

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: unless we have time to reschedule the tomas game before 27th?

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: don't want to deprive his fun and games :D

edus.speaker: ljaybrad123
edus.text: thats why we were going to do 2 tonight

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: ah well, i'm in no rush,

edus.speaker: ljaybrad123
edus.text: but woud need to be done by 8.15 ...

edus.speaker: ljaybrad123
edus.text: so off for the rest of the week

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: but if you fell at work

edus.speaker: ljaybrad123
edus.text: they made me wear slippy overshoes.

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: sounds like a liability case to be contested.

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: sorry, don't want to sound prying :P

edus.speaker: ljaybrad123
edus.text: but I don't really know what to do...

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: there's always no win no fee people

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: did they file an accident report?

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: sorry, guess whose dad worked in insurance :P

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: and make sure a report is filed

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: so you have something to work with

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: if you don't deal with the evidence now

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: the report and/or questions of liability are most important

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: maybe a trip to the doctors as well in that case

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: well at least that's on file.

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: I'd send the workplace a message

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: checking they've filed an accident report

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: and saying you're considering your options

edus.speaker: ljaybrad123
edus.text: but pretty sure it's not broken

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: at least you give them notice

edus.speaker: ljaybrad123
edus.text: I told them i needed a report yesterday

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: and doing it when you feel bad blows

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: but it's one of those things you have to move on, sadly

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: and i do, of course, hope you feel better soon

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: so you don't miss out too much

edus.speaker: ljaybrad123
edus.text: yeah I just feel naff - and now cant work today or tomorrow at least

edus.speaker: ljaybrad123
edus.text: I can't lift any of the kids atm

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: I'd definitely cost up lost earnings

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: and try and get a settlement

edus.speaker: ljaybrad123
edus.text: it's just kinda like is it worth all the hassle for £70

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: You might find they're sweating it

edus.speaker: ljaybrad123
edus.text: I get the distinct feeling they dont really care

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: if they think you're pursuing legal action

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: sounds like there's a case to be heard

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: if he's not here in 7 mins

edus.speaker: gotwood4sheep
edus.text: we'll not have time before william arrives
